function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0006
alias: helios_backfill_intake_audit
issued_on: 2025-12-18
total_eur: 520
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 260
    line_eur: 520
---
# Helios intake audit invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0006                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_intake_audit   |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-18                     |
| total_eur      | 520                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit | 2   | 260      | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                             |     |          | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from the first phase when the work was mostly diagnosis and process-mapping.

next_step.current_state: Invoice file was updated successfully with frontmatter and preserved body. Next required step per inbox workflow is deleting processed inbox item; deletion precondition is satisfied because 00_inbox/000_next-task.md was read earlier.
next_step.observation: Write operation on the target invoice file completed without error.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed oldest inbox item, migrated requested invoice note with YAML frontmatter, and deleted inbox request file. Ready to report completion.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_next-task.md after completing the requested structured-record update.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request by OCR-structuring `50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md`: added invoice YAML frontmatter per schema and preserved the original note body verbatim below the frontmatter. Then removed the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap and lane rulebooks; used process-next-inbox-item workflow, inbox v2 update, OCR/migration workflow, and finance schema; preserved original body text exactly and kept diff focused; deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly instructed OCR/frontmatter extraction for the specified invoice note. The target note contained all required invoice fields and one line item in visible text, enabling schema-compliant frontmatter creation without guessing. Update was applied to the same canonical path with the full original body retained below frontmatter, then the processed inbox file was deleted per inbox workflow.
